title: [Skyship, Muster]
description: A broad ruined tunnel opens across the room's eastern edge.  Before the debris-cluttered opening, a straight, bright vermillion line has been drawn.  On the tunnel's side of the line, the floor is made from a highly polished, immaculate white stone.  On the opposite side, a dirt and sand mix is uneven, hard-packed in places and disturbed by footfalls in others.  These sands are further marred with broad and dark crimson splotches.
